basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026: 110 Posts, Apply Online from 15 June to 29 June 2026
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Secondary Service Selection Board (GSSSB), Gandhinagar, has invited online applications for the post of Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3, under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board (GWSSB), which functions under the Narmada, Water Resources, Water Supply and Kalpsar Department. A total of 110 vacancies will be filled through a direct recruitment process based on a competitive written examination. Eligible diploma holders in Mechanical or Automobile Engineering can apply online through the OJAS portal between 15/06/2026 and 29/06/2026.

application_fee.details: The examination fee structure is determined by the candidate's category, and the fee must be paid online only. | Key points regarding fee payment: | Fees must be paid online via Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallets, along with applicable transaction charges. The fee payment deadline is 01/07/2026 (till 23:59 hrs), after which the payment link will close automatically. Candidates who appear for the examination will get their fee refunded; those who remain absent are not entitled to a refund. If an application is rejected by the Board, the fee already paid will not be refunded.

qualification.details: Meeting the eligibility conditions is mandatory before applying for this post. The notification specifies the educational qualification, citizenship, and language requirements that every applicant must fulfil as on the closing date of application (29/06/2026). | To be eligible for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) post, candidates must possess the following: | A Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical) or Diploma in Automobile Engineering from the Technical Examination Board, a recognized university established under a Central or State Act, or an institution deemed to be a university under Section 3 of the UGC Act, 1956. Basic knowledge of computer applications as prescribed under the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi, or both. | A candidate must either be a citizen of India or possess the nationality specified under Rule-7 of the Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. | Age limit is one of the most important eligibility factors, and it is calculated with reference to the last date of application, i.e., 29/06/2026. | The candidate's age should not be less than 18 years and not more than 33 years as on 29/06/2026. Candidates already in Gujarat Government service may get relaxation in the upper age limit as per the applicable rules. | Different categories of candidates are eligible for age relaxation as per government rules. The table below summarizes the relaxation and the resulting maximum age limit.

salary_details.details: The pay structure for this post follows the fixed-pay model applicable to new government recruits in Gujarat, followed by regular pay scale placement. | For the first five years, selected candidates will be appointed on a fixed monthly pay of Rs. 49,600/-, along with other benefits as per the relevant Finance Department resolutions. After five years, subject to satisfactory performance, candidates will be placed in the regular pay scale of Level-7 (Rs. 39,900 to Rs. 1,26,600) as per the 7th Pay Commission, subject to the outcome of pending SLP No. 14124/2012 and SLP No. 14125/2012 before the Hon'ble Supreme Court.

selection_process: GSSSB follows a structured process to prepare the final selection list.

The provisional result of all candidates who appeared for the exam will be published on the Board's website. Candidates who clear the minimum qualifying standard in both Part-A and Part-B will be shortlisted for document verification
approximately twice the number of vacancies in each category based on merit. After document verification

the final selection list and waiting list (if applicable) will be prepared based on marks obtained in the written examination and category-wise vacancy requirements. Appointment recommendations for selected candidates will be sent by the Board to the concerned government department. Qualifying the written exam alone does not guarantee appointment; the appointing authority's satisfaction regarding the candidate's overall suitability is required.

pattern_table.Subject: Constitution of India, Current Affairs, Gujarati & English Comprehension
Technical subject related to educational qualification (Mechanical Engineering)

exam_pattern.details: The selection process is based on a single-stage Computer Based Response Test (CBRT)/OMR-based competitive examination consisting of objective-type MCQ questions, divided into Part-A and Part-B. | Important points about the examination: | The exam consists of a total of 210 questions (90 in Part-A and 120 in Part-B) to be completed in a combined duration of 3 hours (180 minutes). Negative marking applies: for every wrong answer, 1/4th of the marks allotted to that question will be deducted. A provisional answer key will be published after the exam, followed by a final answer key after considering objections raised by candidates. Separate minimum qualifying standards of 40% apply to both Part-A and Part-B for all categories of candidates. | Part-B covers technical subjects relevant to Mechanical Engineering diploma holders. The major topics include Thermodynamics, Fluid Mechanics, Power Engineering, I.C. Engines, Refrigeration and Air-Conditioning, Engineering Mechanics, Mechanics of Materials, Kinematics and Theory of Machines, Engineering Materials, Manufacturing Processes, Metrology and Inspection, Computer Integrated Manufacturing, Operations Research, and Current Trends in these fields. The full subject-wise mark distribution is provided in Appendix-A of the official notification.

how_to_apply: The Board accepts applications only through the online mode via the OJAS portal. Below is the step-by-step process for filling out the online application form for Advertisement No. 419/202627.
Click on "Apply" under the Online Application section and select GSSSB.

Locate Advertisement No. 419/202627 (Assistant Engineer Mechanical, Class-3), click on the cadre name, then click Apply. Review the "More Details" option to read the complete advertisement before proceeding.
Click on Apply Now, then "Skip" to open the Application Format and fill in the Personal Details (fields marked with a red asterisk are mandatory).
Fill in the Educational Details section after completing Personal Details.
Accept the terms under the "Assurance" section by selecting "Yes" and click Save to complete the application.
Note down the generated Application Number for future reference.

Upload your photograph and signature: photo should be 5 cm height x 3.6 cm width, and signature should be 2.5 cm height x 7.5 cm width, both in JPG format not exceeding 15 KB. The photo must have a white background and must not be older than one year from the last date of application.

Click on "Confirm Application" under the Online Application tab, enter your Application Number and Date of Birth, review the details, and confirm only after thorough verification, since no changes are allowed after confirmation. A Confirmation Number will be generated, which must be saved carefully.
Use "Print Application" to download and save a copy of the confirmed application form using your Confirmation Number and Date of Birth before the last date.

Important: A candidate should submit only one application. If multiple applications are submitted, only the last confirmed application with the requisite fee paid will be considered valid, and fees paid against earlier applications will not be adjusted or refunded.
important_instructions: A few additional points related to reservation are worth noting for applicants belonging to reserved categories:

Vacancies in this advertisement may increase or decrease, and the figures shown are subject to change. Reserved category posts are applicable only to candidates who are originally from Gujarat and belong to the respective reserved category. If suitable women candidates are not available against women-reserved posts, those posts will be filled by male candidates from the same reserved category. Both male and female candidates can apply for posts that are not specifically reserved for women within a category, as selection is based on merit.
Before submitting the application, candidates should keep the following points in mind:

Category details once confirmed in the online application cannot be changed later. Any correction must be made by submitting a fresh application with the requisite fee before the last date. All details filled in the application form will be treated as final for the entire recruitment process and must be supported by original documents at the time of verification. Candidates appointed under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board will not be considered employees of the Gujarat Government. The Gujarat Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2023, applies to all competitive examinations conducted by GSSSB, and any violation will attract legal action under this Act. For any queries regarding eligibility, age limit, or the online application/fee process, candidates can contact the Board's office at 079-23258916

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 110 posts of Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 are available under the Gujarat Water Supply and Sewerage Board.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications can be submitted from 15/06/2026 (18:00 hrs) to 29/06/2026 (up to 23:59 hrs).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for GSSSB Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical) or Diploma in Automobile from a recognized university or institution, along with basic computer knowledge and knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 33 years of age as on 29/06/2026, with age relaxation available for reserved categories, women, ex-servicemen, and persons with disabilities as per applicable rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 500/- for unreserved candidates and Rs. 400/- for reserved category candidates (women of all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PWD, and Ex-Servicemen), payable online along with transaction charges.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply online for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online by visiting https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in, selecting GSSSB, and clicking Apply Online against Advertisement No. 419/202627 before the application window closes on 29/06/2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The exam is a single-stage CBRT/OMR-based MCQ test with 210 questions across Part-A (90 marks: Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, Constitution, Current Affairs, Comprehension) and Part-B (120 marks: Technical subject), with a total duration of 3 hours and negative marking of 1/4 mark per wrong answer.

faq.question: Q8. What is the pay scale for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical?
faq.answer: Selected candidates receive a fixed pay of Rs. 49,600/- per month for the first five years, after which they are placed in the regular Level-7 pay scale (Rs. 39,900 to Rs. 1,26,600), subject to satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum qualifying mark for GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical exam?
faq.answer: Candidates must secure a minimum of 40% marks in both Part-A and Part-B separately to qualify for the selection process.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates download the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Mechanical notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification along with the detailed syllabus is available through the PDF Download Link on the GSSSB website: https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in.
